positive: A stylized, vibrant celestial forest scene viewed through a cosmic glass portal. The main subject features massive, interconnected bioluminescent flora with abstract, branching structures and glowing leaves in shades of teal, deep indigo, and luminous gold. Gentle, curved geometric nebula shapes act as the background, providing a starry, deep violet gradient backdrop. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, ideal for a repeat pattern or central print. The style must be a harmonious blend of Art Nouveau and cosmic vaporwave, using sharp, clean silhouettes against deep, contrasting background colors. Lighting should mimic subsurface scattering from the bioluminescent plants, creating a strong glow and high contrast against the dark void. Ultra-detailed, digital painting, high resolution, poster quality.
negative: lowres, blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, dirty, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, grainy, cartoon, photographic, monochrome
